items.name: Anand Balan
items.quote: Material is so good that it doesn't feel exhaustive or even like putting efforts. I enjoyed it as if I'm watching a Discovery documentary :). I'm handling things very professionally now and I noticed the change in me from the first few days of starting the course.

items.name: Ajay Cherukuri
items.role: Software Engineer at Indo Mim Limited
items.quote: Thank you for the online training provided by Cohort AI Labs. I'm now a different person at work. My productivity skyrocketed and things are much easier now.

items.name: P. Shankar Raghavendra
items.quote: Thank you all for tailoring the program specially for me. I'm attending interviews with great confidence now and my SaaS project gained momentum during this course.

items.name: Sai Vineeth Modugavarapu
items.quote: So much information to grasp during the course, but awesome illustrations and practicals made it very easy to understand. Thank you Sasikala Madam.
